overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a walk along a sunny coastal beach. The player approaches and circles a large sea stack rock formation before continuing along the shoreline, revealing a forested coastline with distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach approaching coastal rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking along the dry sandy beach toward the large sea stack rock formation

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation with a natural arch at the base, standing in shallow water near the shore
light tan colored sand with visible ripple patterns and texture
calm blue ocean water surrounding the base of the rock formation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide sunny beach with a prominent sea stack rock formation in the distance. The camera moves forward across dry sand toward the rock, with calm ocean water visible surrounding the formation's base.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal water surrounding the sea stack

events.description: ground surface transitions from dry sand to shallow water as the camera enters the sea

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water toward and around the left side of the rock formation

entered.detail: cave-like opening and rock texture details becoming visible at the base of the sea stack
distant tree line and green vegetation visible on the coastline beyond the rock

segments.scene_description: The camera enters shallow water and approaches the sea stack, revealing detailed rock textures and a natural arch at its base. The rock gradually moves to the left of the frame as the camera passes it, while a distant forested coastline becomes visible on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with forested coastline and beachfront buildings

events.description: large rock formation exits frame left as the camera moves past it, revealing the forested coastline

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wet beach past the rock formation, exploring the coastline

entered.detail: coastal structures and houses visible among the trees on the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Having passed the sea stack, the camera moves along the coastline where the forested shoreline with scattered beach buildings becomes the dominant feature on the right. The ocean remains visible to the left as the camera continues along the wet sandy beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a sunny beach that transitions from a focused approach toward a sea stack to a wide view of a forested coastline. It begins on dry sand, moving steadily toward a prominent rock formation surrounded by calm ocean water. As the camera enters the shallow surf, the sea stack reveals a natural arch at its base before shifting to the left of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal a distant forested shoreline on the right horizon, which becomes the dominant feature as the camera continues along the wet sand. Finally, the perspective settles into a walk along the coast, with the ocean on the left and scattered beach buildings emerging among the trees.
